title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 701.048 - Modifying or repair of on-site sewage disposal system, noncompliance with standards prohibited
text:
701.048.  Modifying or repair of on-site sewage disposal system, noncompliance with standards prohibited. — Except as otherwise provided in section 701.031, no person may construct, modify or repair an on-site sewage disposal system in a manner which does not comply with the state standard established under sections 701.025 to 701.059.
(L. 1994 S.B. 446 § 701.046 subsec. 3)
